replayPolicy.math: premultiplied float SrcOver with coverage: out = (srcPremul * coverage) + dst * (1 - (srcPremul.a * coverage))

classificationReason: FOR-411 consumes the FOR-410 predraw destination state and replays the FOR-408 observed source-over subdraws. The replay remains white for the 16 selected pixels while the FOR-405 post-pass samples are colored, so the diagnostic classifies the full replay as source-over-replay-differs-post-pass rather than insufficient inputs.
